veil_fern.name: Veil Fern
veil_fern.entry: Its fronds turn to face people, not the sun. It seems to be listening.

glasswort.name: Glasswort
glasswort.entry: Translucent stems ring faintly in the wind, like distant chimes.

murmur_moss.name: Murmur Moss
murmur_moss.entry: Warm to the touch. The scanner picks up a slow, steady pulse beneath it.

prismvine.name: Prismvine
prismvine.entry: Grows only near crystal formations, splitting their glow into tiny rainbows.

shard_lily.name: Shard Lily
shard_lily.entry: Petals of living mineral. They realign overnight to face the great crystal.

lattice_bud.name: Lattice Bud
lattice_bud.entry: Its buds grow in perfect geometric lattices. Nothing on Veridia is random.

drift_puff.name: Drift Puff
drift_puff.entry: Releases spores that ride the ion winds. Farms downwind grow strangely well.

ember_cap.name: Ember Cap
ember_cap.entry: Glows brighter before a storm. The colonists call it the honest forecaster.

sleeper_bell.name: Sleeper Bell
sleeper_bell.entry: Blooms only while the twin moons are both dark. Something below dreams with it.
